title: 東京駅
setting: Tokyo Station. 09:00. You are a tourist trying to find the right platform for the Shinkansen to Kyoto.

npc.name: 駅員 田中
npc.personality: polite and efficient station staff. Uses formal keigo. Very helpful to travelers.
npc.initialLine: いらっしゃいませ。どうされましたか？
npc.initialTranslation: Welcome. How can I help you?

debriefRu: あなたは東京駅にいます。京都行きの新幹線に乗りたいです。駅員にプラットホームを聞いてください。
debriefEn: You are at Tokyo Station. You want to take the Shinkansen to Kyoto. Ask the station staff which platform.

turns.instruction: Excuse yourself and ask which platform the Shinkansen to Kyoto departs from.

prompt.ru: Sumimasen, Kyōto-iki no Shinkansen wa nanban-sen desu ka?
prompt.phonetic: Soo-mee-mah-sen, Kyoh-toh-ee-kee no Shinkansen wa nan-ban-sen des-ka?
prompt.en: Excuse me, which platform is the Shinkansen to Kyoto?
prompt.native_script: すみません、京都行きの新幹線は何番線ですか？

turns.instruction: Check that this is the correct platform for the Kyoto Shinkansen.

prompt.ru: Kono hōmu de Kyōto-iki no Shinkansen desu ka?
prompt.phonetic: Koh-noh hoh-moo deh Kyoh-toh-ee-kee no Shinkansen des-kah?
prompt.en: Is this the platform for the Shinkansen to Kyoto?
prompt.native_script: このホームで京都行きの新幹線ですか？

turns.instruction: Ask how long the trip takes to Kyoto.

prompt.ru: Kyōto made dono kurai kakarimasu ka?
prompt.en: How long does it take to Kyoto?
prompt.native_script: 京都までどのくらいかかりますか？

turns.instruction: Thank them and ask where the ticket gate is.

prompt.ru: Arigatō gozaimasu. Kaisatsu-guchi wa doko desu ka?
prompt.phonetic: Ah-ree-gah-toh goh-zai-mahs. Kai-sah-tsu-goo-chee wah doh-koh des-kah?
prompt.en: Thank you. Where is the ticket gate?
prompt.native_script: ありがとうございます。改札口はどこですか？

tokens.text: ありがとうございます
tokens.reading: ありがとうございます

turns.instruction: Bow and thank them again very politely.

prompt.native_script: 本当にありがとうございました！

tokens.text: ありがとうございました
tokens.reading: ありがとうございました
